title: Zhou Tingsu
content:
Zhou Tingsu is the mother of Wang Lin.

Book Two
[
]

She is later slaughtered, alongside the entire Wang Clan, by 
Teng Huayuan
 in retaliation for Wang Lin killing his great grandson. His soul was sealed into a soul flag and used as a weapon against Wang Lin. However, Wang Lin managed to retrieve his parents souls.

Book Four
[
]

Finally accepting the reality that his parents are just mortals and allows their souls to enter the cycle of reincarnation.
